praise: Older reviews praise the coach and training atmosphere.
complaints: A three-year-old review says the gym was old and moving; the current physical timetable and post-move facilities are not documented.

confidenceReason: The team is currently active in competition, but the current physical timetable, post-move facility, federation/grading status, pricing and English instruction are all unresolved.

statusNote: Current 2026 competition activity establishes an operating team; the physical site's walk-in timetable remains unverified.
